subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy favors, which the pens of all creation are powerless to recount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بالطافک التی عجزت عن احصائها اقلام العالم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
